Core promise

Less forgetting. More intentional moments.

NudgeR helps high-performing people keep their relationships from getting buried under work, meetings, deadlines, and decision fatigue.

💬

Relationship oriented prompts

Reminder copy changes by relationship type, so partners, friends, parents, and family get the right tone.

⏱

Custom reminder rhythms

Set independent schedules for keep-in-touch, make-time, and thoughtful-action reminders.

✨

One-tap thoughtful actions

Text, call, plan a date, schedule dinner, buy a gift, or order flowers without overthinking the next move.

App preview

A calm relationship dashboard for real life.

Manage your people, see upcoming reminders, schedule events, and tune your profile in a simple mobile-first flow.

How it works

Set it up once. Let the right nudges find you.

1

Start with your profile

Add your name, birthday, city or area, and preferences so reminders feel personal.

2

Add your important people

Create profiles with birthdays, anniversaries, contact details, notes, favorite activities, and custom reminder types.

3

Get timely nudges

See anniversary alerts, birthday prompts, check-ins, thoughtful actions, and make-time suggestions in your feed.

4

Act in one tap

Open Messages with a prefilled note, call them, schedule a date, log an event, or plan a thoughtful gift.

MVP feature set

Designed for relationship consistency, not another productivity chore.

Everything is built around helping users take the next small action before important moments slip by.

Nudge feedBirthdays, anniversaries, check-ins, date nights, flowers, gifts, and make-time prompts.
Local notificationsPhone reminders regenerate after profile changes, completed nudges, and submitted events.
Relationship eventsDate, dinner, movie, brunch, hang out, and drinks can be logged locally.
Calendar supportWhen permission is granted, NudgeR can create phone calendar events.
